# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Follow root `AGENTS.md` as the TOKKI Constitution.

Use this file only as a thin adapter for GitHub Copilot. Shared project rules belong in `AGENTS.md`; detailed local prompt/spec material belongs in `Prompts/` and `Diagram&ERD&명세서/` when those ignored folders are present in the workspace.

When suggesting code, preserve the modular boundaries and source-order rules in `AGENTS.md`. Do not duplicate secrets, long requirement tables, API specs, or ERD details here.
